parameters.query:
SELECT
  gs.id,
  gs.claim_id,
  gs.earnings_call_id,
  ec.ticker,
  ec.company_name,
  ec.call_date,
  ec.fiscal_quarter,
  gs.claim_type AS guidance_topic,
  gs.direction,
  gs.direction_confidence,
  gs.claim_text,
  gs.claim_summary,
  gs.transcript_citation,
  gs.change_description,
  gs.metric_name AS metric_type,
  gs.metric_value_current AS quantified_value,
  gs.metric_value_prior,
  gs.falsification_flag,
  gs.schema_valid
FROM guidance_signals gs
JOIN earnings_calls ec ON ec.id = gs.earnings_call_id
WHERE ec.ticker = '{{ $('Set Company Input').first().json.ticker }}'
  AND gs.schema_valid = true
ORDER BY ec.call_date DESC, gs.direction_confidence DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT
  ra.id,
  ra.claim_id,
  ra.earnings_call_id,
  ec.ticker,
  ec.call_date,
  ec.fiscal_quarter,
  ra.risk_category,
  ra.severity,
  ra.risk_text AS risk_description,
  ra.risk_summary,
  ra.uncertainty_language,
  ra.transcript_citation,
  ra.prior_disclosure_call,
  ra.schema_valid
FROM risk_admissions ra
JOIN earnings_calls ec ON ec.id = ra.earnings_call_id
WHERE ec.ticker = '{{ $('Set Company Input').first().json.ticker }}'
  AND ra.schema_valid = true
ORDER BY ec.call_date DESC, ra.severity DESC
LIMIT 30;

SELECT
  qa.id,
  qa.earnings_call_id,
  ec.ticker,
  ec.call_date,
  ec.fiscal_quarter,
  qa.question_topic,
  qa.question_text,
  qa.response_type,
  qa.response_summary,
  qa.pressure_score,
  qa.asked_by_firms AS analyst_firm,
  qa.is_repeated_topic AS evasion_flag,
  qa.times_asked,
  qa.schema_valid
FROM qa_pressure_map qa
JOIN earnings_calls ec ON ec.id = qa.earnings_call_id
WHERE ec.ticker = '{{ $('Set Company Input').first().json.ticker }}'
  AND qa.schema_valid = true
ORDER BY ec.call_date DESC, qa.pressure_score DESC
LIMIT 30;

SELECT
  ns.id,
  ns.claim_id,
  ns.ticker,
  ns.published_at,
  ns.source_name,
  ns.headline,
  ns.sentiment_label,
  ns.sentiment_score,
  ns.topic_tags,
  ns.schema_valid
FROM news_signals ns
WHERE ns.ticker = '{{ $('Set Company Input').first().json.ticker }}'
  AND ns.schema_valid = true
ORDER BY ns.published_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT
  tss.id,
  tss.claim_id,
  tss.ticker,
  tss.snapshot_date,
  tss.burst_detected,
  tss.burst_ratio,
  tss.velocity_anomaly,
  tss.velocity_z_score,
  tss.ai_focus_increasing,
  tss.rising_languages,
  tss.declining_languages,
  tss.emerging_languages,
  tss.stale_repo_count,
  tss.schema_valid
FROM tech_stack_signals tss
WHERE tss.ticker = '{{ $('Set Company Input').first().json.ticker }}'
  AND tss.schema_valid = true
ORDER BY tss.snapshot_date DESC
LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO contradiction_reports (
  resolve_id, ticker, company_name, fiscal_quarter,
  lookback_days, total_flags, high_severity_count,
  medium_severity_count, overall_confidence_level,
  overall_assessment, overall_investment_relevance,
  patterns_active, patterns_skipped, signal_counts,
  requires_human_review, created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.resolve_id }}',
  '{{ $json.ticker }}',
  '{{ $json.company_name }}',
  {{ $json.fiscal_quarter ? "'" + $json.fiscal_quarter + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.lookback_days }},
  {{ $json.detection_summary.total_flags }},
  {{ $json.detection_summary.high_severity }},
  {{ $json.detection_summary.medium_severity }},
  '{{ $json.detection_summary.overall_confidence_level }}',
  '{{ ($json.llm_analysis && $json.llm_analysis.overall_assessment) ? $json.llm_analysis.overall_assessment.replace(/'/g, "''").slice(0,1000) : "" }}',
  {{ ($json.llm_analysis && $json.llm_analysis.overall_investment_relevance != null && $json.llm_analysis.overall_investment_relevance !== undefined) ? $json.llm_analysis.overall_investment_relevance : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.detection_summary.patterns_active }},
  {{ $json.detection_summary.patterns_skipped }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.signal_counts) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.detection_summary.requires_human_review ? 'true' : 'false' }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (resolve_id) DO UPDATE SET
  total_flags = EXCLUDED.total_flags,
  overall_confidence_level = EXCLUDED.overall_confidence_level
RETURNING id, resolve_id, overall_confidence_level;

INSERT INTO contradiction_flags (
  flag_id, resolve_id, ticker, pattern_id, pattern_name,
  severity, conflict_description,
  claim_a_id, claim_a_source, claim_a_text, claim_a_direction,
  claim_b_id, claim_b_source, claim_b_text, claim_b_direction,
  evidence_for_a, evidence_for_b,
  plausibility, investment_relevance_score, self_resolving,
  analyst_memo, recommended_action,
  resolution_status, requires_human_review, flagged_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.flag_id }}',
  '{{ $json.resolve_id }}',
  '{{ $json.ticker }}',
  {{ $json.pattern_id }},
  '{{ $json.pattern_name }}',
  '{{ $json.severity }}',
  '{{ ($json.conflict_description||'').replace(/'/g,"''").slice(0,500) }}',
  {{ $json.claim_a_id ? "'" + $json.claim_a_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.claim_a_source ? "'" + $json.claim_a_source + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.claim_a_text ? "'" + ($json.claim_a_text||'').replace(/'/g,"''").slice(0,500) + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.claim_a_direction ? "'" + $json.claim_a_direction + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.claim_b_id ? "'" + $json.claim_b_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.claim_b_source ? "'" + $json.claim_b_source + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.claim_b_text ? "'" + ($json.claim_b_text||'').replace(/'/g,"''").slice(0,500) + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.claim_b_direction ? "'" + $json.claim_b_direction + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ ($json.evidence_for_a||'').replace(/'/g,"''").slice(0,600) }}',
  '{{ ($json.evidence_for_b||'').replace(/'/g,"''").slice(0,600) }}',
  '{{ $json.plausibility || 'INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE' }}',
  {{ $json.investment_relevance_score !== null && $json.investment_relevance_score !== undefined ? $json.investment_relevance_score : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.self_resolving !== null && $json.self_resolving !== undefined ? $json.self_resolving : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.analyst_memo ? "'" + ($json.analyst_memo||'').replace(/'/g,"''").slice(0,1000) + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.recommended_action || 'ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN' }}',
  '{{ $json.resolution_status || 'UNRESOLVED' }}',
  {{ $json.requires_human_review ? 'true' : 'false' }},
  '{{ $json.flagged_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (flag_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, flag_id, severity;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contradiction_reports (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  resolve_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  ticker TEXT,
  company_name TEXT,
  fiscal_quarter TEXT,
  lookback_days INT,
  total_flags INT DEFAULT 0,
  high_severity_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  medium_severity_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  overall_confidence_level TEXT,
  overall_assessment TEXT,
  overall_investment_relevance INT,
  patterns_active INT,
  patterns_skipped INT,
  signal_counts JSONB,
  requires_human_review BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contradiction_flags (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  flag_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  resolve_id TEXT,
  ticker TEXT,
  pattern_id INT,
  pattern_name TEXT,
  severity TEXT,
  conflict_description TEXT,
  claim_a_id TEXT,
  claim_a_source TEXT,
  claim_a_text TEXT,
  claim_a_direction TEXT,
  claim_b_id TEXT,
  claim_b_source TEXT,
  claim_b_text TEXT,
  claim_b_direction TEXT,
  evidence_for_a TEXT,
  evidence_for_b TEXT,
  plausibility TEXT,
  investment_relevance_score INT,
  self_resolving BOOLEAN,
  analyst_memo TEXT,
  recommended_action TEXT,
  resolution_status TEXT DEFAULT 'UNRESOLVED',
  requires_human_review BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  flagged_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

SELECT ticker, burst_detected, 
       burst_ratio, velocity_anomaly,
       declining_languages
FROM tech_stack_signals
WHERE ticker = 'MSFT';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS news_signals (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  claim_id TEXT,
  ticker TEXT,
  published_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  source_name TEXT,
  headline TEXT,
  sentiment_label TEXT,
  sentiment_score NUMERIC,
  topic_tags TEXT[],
  schema_valid BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE
);
ALTER TABLE news_signals 
ADD CONSTRAINT news_signals_claim_id_unique 
UNIQUE (claim_id);

INSERT INTO news_signals(
  claim_id, ticker, published_at, source_name,
  headline, sentiment_label, sentiment_score,
  topic_tags, schema_valid
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.claim_id }}',
  '{{ $json.ticker }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}'::TIMESTAMPTZ,
  '{{ ($json.source_name || "").replace(/'/g, " ").replace(/'/g, " ").replace(/'/g, " ") }}',
  '{{ ($json.headline || "").replace(/'/g, " ").replace(/'/g, " ").replace(/'/g, " ") }}',
  '{{ $json.sentiment_label }}',
  {{ $json.sentiment_score }},
  ARRAY[{{ ($json.topic_tags || []).map(t => "'" + t.replace(/'/g, " ") + "'").join(',') || "'general'" }}],
  true
)
ON CONFLICT (claim_id) DO UPDATE SET
  sentiment_label = EXCLUDED.sentiment_label,
  sentiment_score = EXCLUDED.sentiment_score;
